flavourText: A towering construct of tension, compression and torsion that refuses to buckle. Identify every force and make it crack!
Built from every stock form imaginable and held together with standard components. Know your scales of production to dismantle it piece by piece!
A shape-shifting beast that changes between woods, metals and polymers at will. Name its properties and pin it down!
A factory floor fiend that injection moulds minions and vacuum forms shields. Master every process to shut down the production line!
A sparking, gear-grinding machine powered by cams and capacitors. Trace the system from input to output and pull the plug!
A ghost that traps designers in a loop of their first idea. Break free with user-centred thinking and creative research!
Cut off one design and two more take its place. Only by iterating, testing and refining can you find the final form!
Nothing gets past this obsessive examiner. If your answers fall outside the tolerance, you will not pass its go/no-go gauge!
A wasteful machine that devours resources and discards products. Deploy the 6 Rs of sustainability to bring it to a halt!
A dimension-warping villain that distorts every drawing you make. Master your projections and render it powerless!
